# CancellationHandler.Deregister method

Removes the handler for *requestId* WITHOUT calling it (call on normal completion). Safe for an unknown id. Mirrors TS `deregister`.

```csharp
public void Deregister(RequestId requestId)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| requestId | The request id. |
